comment: ★ SECRET omen definitions (01 §7). One per day, never announced — only the tellHint leaks to the Guildhall rumor strip. mods mutate sim numbers; gen mutates layout/spawns; conditionalSubjects mark claims banked under this sky as CONDITIONAL.

omens.tellHint: Squeaking beneath the first hall, before the first room.
The air does not move today. Things hear farther.
The walls weep. The floors glisten.
Snuff a match at the door — the dark eats it faster.
Wax drips from nowhere. The first floor is littered with it.
Halos of wings around every flame.
The dead are eager to speak today.
The candle sweats. Watch the counter run.
A warm glow from the stairwells, as if someone came before.
The shadows stretch longer than they ought, from the very first step.
Your steps make no sound. Nothing turns to listen.
The first chest you knock on… growls back.
